headline: EQT (EQT) Is Up 7.2% After Winning €5B EU Tech Scaleup Mandate Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: EQT was recently selected by the European Commission and founding investors as preferred investment adviser and fund manager for the €5.00 billion Scaleup Europe Fund, backing AI, quantum computing, clean energy, biotech and medical innovation from Series B onwards. This appointment, won through a competitive process against established European venture firms, underlines EQT’s growing role as a key allocator of capital to high-impact European technology scaleups. Next, we’ll examine how...
